summary: On December 13, 2022, there was a statistically anomalous spike in adverse event reports for sertraline, with 57 reports received compared to an expected 29.39 based on Holt-Winters forecasting.
notable_pattern: Reports from December 11 and 12 included multiple severe adverse events, including death, hospitalizations, and life-threatening conditions, with some patients taking multiple medications concurrently.
confidence_caveat: This signal is based on a limited sample of 8 reports and should not be considered a clinical conclusion.
